services.label: WHAT WE DO
services.title: FROM GENETICS TO MARKET
services.body: We develop European hazelnuts from the Southern Hemisphere, integrating genetic innovation and high-precision processes for the world's most demanding markets.
transition.label: MARKETS
transition.title: WE EXPORT TO
transition.subtitle: From Chile's Patagonia to four continents — Europe, South America, Asia and Oceania — delivering premium hazelnuts to the world's most demanding markets.
gallery.title: OUR SERVICES
gallery.01.heading:
CLEANING
& DRYING
gallery.01.body: Industrial washing and controlled drying to standardize fruit moisture, ensuring optimal quality for processing and storage.
gallery.02.heading:
CRACKING
& CALIBRATION
gallery.02.body: Precision calibration, mechanical shelling, optical selection and export-grade packaging.
gallery.03.heading: EXPORTS
gallery.03.body: End-to-end international logistics where each lot is fully traceable and meets international regulations.
gallery.04.heading:
VALUE-ADDED
PRODUCTS
gallery.04.body: Roasted kernels, hazelnut paste, praline, cocoa paste and dragees — crafted from our own premium hazelnuts.
final.title: Let's Work Together
final.body:
Reliable supply. Consistent quality.
Built for long-term partnerships.

products.item.inshell.name: In-shell Hazelnuts

products.packaging.label: PACKAGING
products.packaging.title: TAILORED TO YOUR NEEDS
products.packaging.maxibags: Maxi Bags (Big Bags): 1,000-1,100 kg (±5 kg) polymer mesh, protected with VQM liner, vacuum-packed, modified atmosphere (nitrogen) and heat-sealed.
products.packaging.boxes: 12 kg boxes or custom formats per client requirements
products.packaging.labeling: All boxes and bags properly labeled with Nefuen Trading product name and lot code.
products.cert.label: CERTIFICATIONS
products.cert.title: QUALITY GUARANTEED
products.cert.subtitle: At Nefuen Trading, excellence and commitment to our clients and collaborators are the pillar of our operations. We hold international certifications that validate the quality of our processes and ethical conduct.
products.cert.brcgs.title: BRCGS Global Standard for Food Safety
products.cert.brcgs.body: This certification guarantees that our drying, calibration, cracking and selection processes meet the strictest international safety and quality standards.
products.cert.smeta.title: SMETA 4-Pillars
products.cert.smeta.body: We operate under the world's most rigorous ethical audit model, evaluating four fundamental pillars:
products.cert.smeta.labor: Labor Standards: We guarantee a fair work environment, with freely chosen employment and legal wages.
products.cert.smeta.health: Health & Safety: We ensure safe and hygienic working conditions for our entire team.
products.cert.smeta.environment: Environment: We actively monitor and mitigate our environmental impact, with clear goals for optimizing resources such as water and energy.
products.cert.smeta.ethics: Business Ethics: We have strict anti-corruption and anti-bribery policies, operating with full transparency and legal compliance.

aboutus.title: ABOUT US
aboutus.subtitle: Our Story
aboutus.hero.label: ABOUT US
aboutus.hero.title: EXPORTING QUALITY, CULTIVATING TRUST
aboutus.hero.subtitle: From Chile's Patagonia to the world
aboutus.story.label: OUR STORY
aboutus.story.title: TWO DECADES OF INNOVATION
aboutus.story.subtitle: Nefuen Trading Chile was born as part of the development of European hazelnut cultivation in southern Chile, driven by the Mohr and Goycoolea families, who started this project in the early 2000s as an innovative productive alternative in the Osorno area. After years of research, genetic development and orchard establishment, the project consolidated with the introduction of new varieties and expansion of plantations across different regions. In 2019, Nefuen Trading Chile SpA was formally established with the goal of commercializing and exporting European hazelnuts, integrating the entire production chain from cultivation to international markets. Today, Nefuen Trading Chile represents the combination of agricultural experience, innovation and international vision, bringing the quality of southern Chile's hazelnuts to the world.
aboutus.parallax.quote: To produce, process and commercialize world-class European hazelnuts, vertically integrating the entire value chain
aboutus.mission.label: OUR MISSION
aboutus.mission.title: EXCELLENCE FROM ORIGIN
aboutus.mission.subtitle: To produce, process and commercialize world-class European hazelnuts, vertically integrating the entire value chain to guarantee traceability and excellence. We are committed to driving agricultural development in southern Chile through sustainable processes and long-term trust relationships with our global clients.
aboutus.vision.label: OUR VISION
aboutus.vision.title: LEADING FROM THE SOUTHERN HEMISPHERE
aboutus.vision.subtitle: To be the technological and productive benchmark for European hazelnuts in the Southern Hemisphere, leading the industry through a unique vertical integration that combines cutting-edge genetic innovation and high-precision selection processes, to become the strategic partner of the world's most demanding markets.
aboutus.team.label: OUR TEAM
aboutus.team.title: THE PEOPLE BEHIND NEFUEN
aboutus.team.subtitle: A dedicated team leading Nefuen Trading.
aboutus.team.members.0.name: Jorge Mohr
aboutus.team.members.1.name: Alex Clark
aboutus.team.members.2.name: Macarena Kremer
aboutus.team.members.3.name: Elizabeth Ceriani
aboutus.team.members.4.name: Germán Ziebrecht
aboutus.team.members.5.name: Alfredo Herbach
aboutus.team.members.6.name: Daniela Vásquez
aboutus.grupo.label: PART OF
aboutus.grupo.title: GRUPO HIJUELAS
aboutus.grupo.subtitle: Nefuen Trading is part of Grupo Hijuelas, a Chilean agro-industrial conglomerate with over 30 years of experience in national agricultural development. The group vertically integrates the entire production chain — from precision agriculture to international commercialization — with operations in hazelnuts, fruit trees and forestry production.
aboutus.grupo.genetics.label: OUR GENETICS
aboutus.grupo.genetics.text: Through our Nursery, we guarantee cultivation success from its origin. We have cutting-edge technical infrastructure for propagating high-quality plants, specializing in American varieties (like Yamhill), recognized for their high yield, resistance and adaptability to southern Chile conditions.
aboutus.cert.label: CERTIFICATIONS
aboutus.cert.title: COMMITTED TO EXCELLENCE
aboutus.cert.subtitle: At Nefuen Trading, excellence and commitment to our clients and collaborators are the pillar of our operations. We hold international certifications that validate the quality of our processes and ethical conduct.
aboutus.cert.brcgs: BRCGS Global Standard for Food Safety: Guarantees our drying, calibration, cracking and selection processes meet the strictest international safety and quality standards.
aboutus.cert.smeta: SMETA 4-Pillars: We operate under the world's most rigorous ethical audit model, evaluating: Labor Standards, Health & Safety, Environment, and Business Ethics.

legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.section.0.heading: Introduction
legal.privacy.section.0.body: Nefuen Trading Chile SpA ("Nefuen Trading", "we", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information when you visit our website nefuentrading.cl or interact with our services.
legal.privacy.section.1.heading: Information We Collect
legal.privacy.section.1.body: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide, including your name, email address, company name, and message content when you use our contact form. We also automatically collect certain technical data such as your IP address, browser type, and pages visited through standard web analytics.
legal.privacy.section.2.heading: How We Use Your Information
legal.privacy.section.2.body: We use the information collected to respond to your inquiries, process business requests, improve our website and services, comply with legal obligations, and communicate relevant updates about our products and services.
legal.privacy.section.3.heading: Data Sharing
legal.privacy.section.3.body: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share data with trusted service providers who assist in operating our website (such as email delivery and analytics services), always under strict confidentiality agreements.
legal.privacy.section.4.heading: Data Security
legal.privacy.section.4.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encrypted data transmission (SSL/TLS), secure server infrastructure, and restricted access to personal data.
legal.privacy.section.5.heading: Data Retention
legal.privacy.section.5.body: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this policy, or as required by applicable law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 24 months.
legal.privacy.section.6.heading: Your Rights
legal.privacy.section.6.body: Under Chilean Law No. 19,628 on the Protection of Private Life, you have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at infonefuen@grupohijuelas.com.
legal.privacy.section.7.heading: Changes to This Policy
legal.privacy.section.7.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
legal.terms.title: Terms of Use
legal.terms.section.0.heading: Acceptance of Terms
legal.terms.section.0.body: By accessing and using the Nefuen Trading website (nefuentrading.cl), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using this site.
legal.terms.section.1.heading: Use of the Website
legal.terms.section.1.body: This website is provided for informational purposes about Nefuen Trading's products and services. You may not use this site for any unlawful purpose or in a way that could damage, disable, or impair the website's functionality.
legal.terms.section.2.heading: Intellectual Property
legal.terms.section.2.body: All content on this website — including text, images, logos, graphics, and design — is the property of Nefuen Trading Chile SpA or its licensors and is protected by Chilean and international intellectual property laws. Reproduction without prior written consent is prohibited.
legal.terms.section.3.heading: Product Information
legal.terms.section.3.body: While we strive to ensure the accuracy of product information on this website, Nefuen Trading does not warrant that product descriptions, specifications, or other content is complete, reliable, or error-free. All product offerings are subject to availability and may change without notice.
legal.terms.section.4.heading: Limitation of Liability
legal.terms.section.4.body: Nefuen Trading shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this website. The website and its content are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind.
legal.terms.section.5.heading: Third-Party Links
legal.terms.section.5.body: This website may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for your convenience only. Nefuen Trading has no control over the content of these sites and assumes no responsibility for their content or privacy practices.
legal.terms.section.6.heading: Governing Law
legal.terms.section.6.body: These Terms of Use shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Chile. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Osorno, Chile.
legal.terms.section.7.heading: Contact Information
legal.terms.section.7.body: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at infonefuen@grupohijuelas.com or at our offices located at Ruta 5 Sur km 928, Osorno, Chile.
legal.terms.section.8.heading: Changes to Terms
legal.terms.section.8.body: Nefuen Trading reserves the right to modify these Terms of Use at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on this website. Your continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
legal.cookies.title: Cookie Policy
legal.cookies.section.0.heading: What Are Cookies
legal.cookies.section.0.body: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, provide a better user experience, and supply information to site owners.
legal.cookies.section.1.heading: Cookies We Use
legal.cookies.section.1.body: We use essential cookies required for the basic functionality of our website (such as language preferences), analytics cookies to understand how visitors interact with our site (via privacy-friendly analytics), and functional cookies that remember your preferences to enhance your experience.
legal.cookies.section.2.heading: Essential Cookies
legal.cookies.section.2.body: These cookies are necessary for the website to function properly. They enable core features such as language selection and page navigation. The website cannot function correctly without these cookies, and they cannot be disabled.
legal.cookies.section.3.heading: Analytics Cookies
legal.cookies.section.3.body: We use privacy-friendly analytics to collect anonymous, aggregated data about website usage. This helps us understand which pages are most visited and how users navigate the site, allowing us to improve the user experience. No personally identifiable information is collected.
legal.cookies.section.4.heading: Managing Cookies
legal.cookies.section.4.body: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies or delete existing cookies. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this website. Refer to your browser's help section for instructions on managing cookies.
legal.cookies.section.5.heading: Changes to This Policy
legal.cookies.section.5.body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology or legislation. Any updates will be posted on this page with a revised date. We encourage you to check this page periodically for the latest information.
